title: Dissolution
description: Dissolve blocks in cauldrons to infuse items
body:
[![Made for ModFest 1.21](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/1.21/full.svg)](https://modfest.net/1.21)

Right-click an block in a filled cauldron to dissolve it. Its attributes (break time, blast resistance, light level, and friction) will be added to the water, and you can right-click an item to infuse it, or shift-right-click to reset. Recipes are data-driven, and an included example allows using a torch or other light-emitting block with an arrow to craft a spectral arrow.
